# PRD-NNNN — <Title>

<!-- Header Block: the document title line in the form "PRD-NNNN — <Title>". -->

## Metadata
<!-- Metadata: the document's identifying fields; fill each value when the PRD is created. -->

- **PRD ID:** PRD-NNNN
- **Title:** <one line: the capability name>
- **Status:** <one line: current status value, per the documentation status definitions>
- **Version:** <one line: current version, per the versioning rules>
- **Scope level:** Product behaviour (non-technical)

> One line: this document describes product behaviour only, not implementation (no APIs, databases, frameworks, backend, frontend, storage, or security).

---

## Required Sections
<!-- Required Sections: the 16 sections below are mandatory; keep them in order and do not add example product content. -->

## 1. Purpose
<!-- One line: what capability this PRD defines and why it exists. -->

## 2. Business Value
<!-- One line: why the capability matters, tied to the Foundation principles. -->

## 3. Scope
<!-- One line: what this capability includes. -->

## 4. Out of Scope
<!-- One line: what it excludes, including V2/excluded items; flag conflicts as Review Notes. -->

## 5. Core Concepts
<!-- One line: reference Foundation/glossary terminology used here; do not redefine it. -->

## 6. Business Rules
<!-- One line: approved behaviour only; one rule per line. -->

## 7. User Behaviour
<!-- One line: what each role (Guest, User, Business, Admin) can do in this capability. -->

## 8. Permissions Matrix
<!-- One line: actions by role; mark undefined cells TODO; keep consistent with the Identity PRD. -->

## 9. State Transitions
<!-- One line: only transitions supported by approved decisions; TODO for undefined ones. -->

## 10. User Flows
<!-- One line: complete product-behaviour flows, step by step. -->

## 11. Functional Requirements
<!-- One line: product behaviour only; one requirement per line. -->

## 12. Non-functional Requirements
<!-- One line: qualitative expectations from Foundation principles only; no technical metrics. -->

## 13. Acceptance Criteria
<!-- One line: Gherkin scenarios (Given / When / Then) covering the requirements. -->

## 14. Related PRDs
<!-- One line: cross-references to other PRDs. -->

## 15. Related ADRs
<!-- One line: links to records in docs/adr/; leave TODO if none. -->

## 16. Open Questions
<!-- One line: TODO items only. -->
